creator: guru@unixarea.de
text:
Creating a jail in a very recent CURRENT r342378 and ports latest with:

# poudriere jail  -c -j freebsd-r342378 -m svn+http -v head@r342378

works fine but let stay the created tree below

/usr/obj/usr/local/poudriere/jails/freebsd-r342378/...

I don't know if the tree could simple be removed after creating the jail. In any case, this tree gets in the way if you want to transfer /usr/[src|obj] to some other host for an installation there.
